Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Seeing a film at Screen Shot Movie Theater will raise your {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}, {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}, or {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} depending on the movie's theme. The lineup will change every day, so be sure to check back often.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you get a part-time job working at the theater, you can pick up a shift {f 0 1 2}during the afternoon on non-school days{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Both watching a movie and working a shift will pass the time.[n]{f 1 1}
